events.title: Trade Fest (doubles daily trades)
events.blurb: Trade Fest is LIVE right now through July 10 — daily sticker trades doubled from 5 to 10. This is the highest-volume trading window of the Simpsons season. If you're one sticker short of a set, now is the time to post and match: you get twice as many shots at it today.

events.title: The Simpsons Album
events.blurb: Simpsons album has 20 days left — 21 main sets + Episode sets, 34 gold stickers total. Two Golden Blitzes done (Blinky Jun 28; Obviously Grilled + More Coffee Jul 4–5). Third Golden Blitz expected Jul 9–13. Gold sticker trading demand is at its seasonal peak; Trade Fest (Jul 8–10) doubles daily trades to 10 — list your Simpsons gold dupes now while demand and trade allowance are both at their highest.

events.title: Krustyland Invasion (Episode Stickers Set 3)
events.blurb: Episode Stickers Set 3 runs until July 15 — only 6 days left. 9 Simpsons stickers including gold-rarities with notoriously low drop rates. Unopened Episode Packs auto-convert to the next set when this ends, so don't sit on dupes: trade them this week or they become the next set's problem.

events.title: Summer Splash
events.blurb: Summer quest chain runs all season — card dupes stack up fast during the grind. Get your H:/W: list posted before the next Cards Boom so you're first in line when supply floods the community.

talkingPoints: Trade Fest is live in Monopoly GO right now (Jul 8–10) — daily sticker trades doubled from 5 to 10. Use every trade slot today and tomorrow while the window is open.
Watch for the next Cards Boom in Coin Master — it drops 50% extra cards from every chest, which means a flood of duplicates. The traders who post their H:/W: *before* it hits clear the most.
Gold Card Trade events in Coin Master multiply rare/super-rare trade value 3–5×. If you've got golds you're sitting on, that's the window to move them and finish a set.
Pro tip: scan your whole album once and SwapDeck shows you every player who's missing a card you have spare. Beats scrolling H:/W: lists by hand.
Stuck one card from finishing a set? Post it — someone here almost certainly has it as a dupe collecting dust.
Golden cards are the hardest to move solo. The Trade Chain + group league here exist to match you with the right holder faster.
Third Simpsons Golden Blitz is expected Jul 9–13 — could be today. If you're holding a Simpsons gold dupe, list it NOW. Once the Blitz window opens, demand spikes and the line gets long fast.
The Simpsons album closes July 29 — 20 days left. Completion pressure is at maximum. Anyone missing a gold sticker right now is highly motivated to trade.

Krustyland Invasion Episode Stickers Set 3 runs through July 15 — only 6 days left. Gold-tier Episode Stickers have brutal drop rates. If you landed one as a dupe, you're holding the most in-demand trade item of the week.

Heads up: when Krustyland Invasion ends July 15, all unopened Episode Sticker Packs convert to the NEXT set automatically. Trade your dupes before the window closes or they stop being useful for current completions.
Scopely's MONOPOLY GO!Chat app (6.5M groups, 25M messages!) is where sticker trades are being organized. SwapDeck finds your match — the trade itself gets coordinated wherever you chat.

Scam reports are a constant undercurrent in Coin Master Facebook groups — there are literally groups named 'COIN MASTER TRADE - SCAMMERS BANNED'. A trade log is your best protection in any platform trade.
Board Adventure is Coin Master's standalone card-collecting app — if you're playing both, make sure your H:/W: lists cover both games so you don't miss a cross-game trade partner.

Coin Master's in-game trading requires both players to be Facebook friends — which is exactly why external matching tools exist. If you're not using a platform to find trade partners first, you're trading blind.
